title: Comprehensive Design Review
description: A holistic prompt to act as a senior engineer reviewing a design for common pitfalls.
prompt:
Act as a Senior Principal Mechanical Engineer with 20 years of experience in [Insert Industry, e.g., Consumer Electronics]. Review the following design description/parameters for potential issues. Focus on: 1. Manufacturability (DFM), 2. Assembly (DFA), 3. Structural Integrity, 4. Cost drivers. 

Design Description: [Insert Description]

title: Tolerance Stack Analysis Assistant
description: Helps set up a linear tolerance stack-up calculation.
prompt:
I need to perform a worst-case tolerance stack-up analysis for [Assembly Name]. 
Goal: Determine the minimum and maximum gap at [Location].
List of dimensions involved:
1. [Dim 1] +/- [Tol 1]
2. [Dim 2] +/- [Tol 2]
...
Identify the loop, determine which dimensions are positive/negative contributors, and calculate the resultant gap range.

title: Material Selection Assistant
description: Suggests materials based on environmental and loading constraints.
prompt:
Act as a Materials Scientist. I need to select a material for a [Part Name].
Operating Conditions:
- Temperature: [Min] to [Max] C
- Environment: [e.g., Saltwater, UV exposure, Oil]
- Load: [e.g., High impact, Static load]
- Cost constraint: [Low/Medium/High]

Suggest 3 candidate materials. For each, list: Pros, Cons, and typical yield strength.

title: DFMEA Generator
description: Generates a draft Design Failure Mode and Effects Analysis.
prompt:
Create a draft DFMEA (Design Failure Mode and Effects Analysis) for a [Component Name, e.g., Bicycle Brake Caliper].
Format: Table.
Columns: Function, Potential Failure Mode, Potential Effect of Failure, Potential Cause, Recommended Action.
Focus on safety-critical failure modes.

title: Root Cause 5 Whys
description: Guides a 5 Whys investigation for a specific failure.
prompt:
I am investigating a failure: [Describe Failure, e.g., The shaft sheared at the keyway].
Act as a Failure Analyst. Walk me through a '5 Whys' analysis to find the root cause. Ask me questions if you need more details about the operating conditions or fracture surface.

title: Manufacturing Process Selector
description: Recommends manufacturing processes based on volume and geometry.
prompt:
I have a part with the following characteristics:
- Material: [Material]
- Annual Volume: [Quantity]
- Complexity: [e.g., Undercuts, thin walls]
- Tolerance requirements: [e.g., +/- 0.05mm]

Recommend the best manufacturing process (e.g., CNC, Injection Molding, Die Casting, 3D Printing) and explain why based on cost and capability.

title: CNC Fixture Design Brainstorm
description: Brainstorms holding strategies for machining.
prompt:
I need to machine a [Part Geometry description] on a 3-axis mill.
Suggest 3 fixturing strategies to hold this part securely while maximizing access to features. Consider setup time and rigidity.

title: Cost Reduction Brainstorm
description: Identifies potential areas to reduce part cost.
prompt:
Review this part design for cost reduction opportunities.
Current Design: [Description/Material/Process].
Target: Reduce unit cost by 20%.
Suggest changes to geometry, material, or tolerances that would lower manufacturing costs without compromising function.

title: Datasheet Summarizer
description: Extracts key parameters from a pasted datasheet text.
prompt:
I will paste the text from a component datasheet below. Extract the following parameters into a clean table:
1. Input Voltage Range
2. Max Current Rating
3. Operating Temperature Range
4. Pinout configuration

Datasheet text: [Paste Text]

title: Engineering Python Script
description: Generates Python code for engineering calculations.
prompt:
Write a Python script using 'numpy' and 'matplotlib'.
Task: Calculate and plot the shear and bending moment diagrams for a simply supported beam with a distributed load w = [Value] N/m and length L = [Value] m.
Include comments explaining the equations used.

title: Regulatory Compliance Checklist
description: Generates a checklist for standard compliance.
prompt:
I am designing a [Product, e.g., Medical Device / Consumer Toy].
List the key regulatory standards (ISO, ASTM, FDA, CE) that typically apply to this product category. Create a high-level compliance checklist for the design phase.

title: Supplier RFQ Email
description: Drafts a professional Request for Quote email.
prompt:
Draft a professional email to a new manufacturing supplier requesting a quote (RFQ).
Items: [Part Numbers]
Quantities: [500, 1000, 5000]
Attachments: Drawings and STEP files.
Ask for: Lead time, unit price, and tooling costs. Tone: Professional and direct.

title: Injection Molding Defect Troubleshooter
description: Diagnoses common molding defects.
prompt:
I am seeing [Defect, e.g., Sink Marks / Flash / Short Shots] on my injection molded part.
Material: [Material]
Suggest 3 potential process parameter adjustments (Temperature, Pressure, Time) to resolve this, and 1 potential tooling change.

title: Bolted Joint Calculator
description: Sets up the logic for a bolted joint calculation.
prompt:
Help me calculate the required bolt torque.
Bolt Size: [Size, e.g., M6]
Bolt Class: [Class, e.g., 8.8]
Friction Coefficient: 0.15 (assumed)
Target Preload: 75% of proof load.
Show the formula for torque T = K * F * d and calculate the value.

title: Thermal Analysis Setup
description: Prepares inputs for a thermal simulation or calc.
prompt:
I need to estimate the steady-state temperature of a heatsink.
Power Input: [Watts]
Ambient Temp: [Temp C]
Heatsink Thermal Resistance: [R_th C/W]
Calculate the junction temperature and explain the thermal resistance network analogy.

title: Design of Experiments (DOE) Setup
description: Plans a DOE to test variables.
prompt:
I want to optimize a process with 3 variables: [Var A], [Var B], [Var C].
Suggest a Design of Experiments (DOE) matrix (e.g., Full Factorial or Taguchi) to identify the most influential factors with the minimum number of runs.

title: Patent Search Keywords
description: Generates keywords for a prior art search.
prompt:
I am inventing a [Brief Description of Invention].
Generate a list of 20 keywords and boolean search strings to use in Google Patents to find prior art. Include synonyms and alternative technical terms.

title: User Manual Writer
description: Drafts a section of a user manual.
prompt:
Write a 'Safety Warnings' section for a user manual for a [Product Name].
Include standard warnings for: Electrical Shock, Moving Parts, and Hot Surfaces.
Style: Clear, imperative, and compliant with ANSI Z535 standards.

title: Engineering Meeting Minutes
description: Formats rough notes into minutes.
prompt:
Convert these rough notes from a design review meeting into formal Meeting Minutes.
Format: Attendees, Agenda, Key Decisions, Action Items (with owners and due dates).
Notes: [Paste Notes]

title: Complex Unit Converter
description: Converts mixed units to a standard system.
prompt:
Convert the following values to SI Units (Meters, Kilograms, Seconds, Pascals):
1. Pressure: [Value] PSI
2. Flow rate: [Value] GPM
3. Torque: [Value] in-lbs
4. Power: [Value] HP
